attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	ST_DEAL_AR.DEAL_ID,
	ST_DEAL_AR.CISCO_BOOKED_DATE,
	ST_DEAL_AR.SALES_ORDER_NUMBER,
	ST_DEAL_AR.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
	ST_DEAL_AR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
	'NEW', /*ST_DEAL_AR.OPERATION, */
	ST_DEAL_AR.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
	ST_DEAL_AR.ORDER_CREATION_DATE,
	ST_DEAL_AR.ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT,
	ST_DEAL_AR.SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), /* ST_DEAL_AR.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, */
	USER, /* ST_DEAL_AR.EDW_CREATE_USER, */
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), /* ST_DEAL_AR.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, */
	USER /* ST_DEAL_AR.EDW_UPDATE_USER */
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DEAL_CONS_INCR_AGGR_AR ST_DEAL_AR
